pp-model-raw.raw-yaml:
type: object
properties:
    data:
        type: object
        properties:
            scan_id:
                type: string
                format: uuid
            timestamp:
                type: string
                format: date-time
            conditions:
                type: array
                items:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/DetectedCondition'
            skin_zones:
                type: array
                items:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkinZone'
            recommendations:
                type: array
                items:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/RecommendationResult'

model.name: ScanResponse
model.rawYaml:
type: object
properties:
    data:
        type: object
        properties:
            scan_id:
                type: string
                format: uuid
            timestamp:
                type: string
                format: date-time
            conditions:
                type: array
                items:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/DetectedCondition'
            skin_zones:
                type: array
                items:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/SkinZone'
            recommendations:
                type: array
                items:
                    $ref: '#/components/schemas/RecommendationResult'
